cost.note: Token COUNT is ~equal (58460 vs 56879); the saving is cheaper tokens (impl moved Opus->Sonnet), not fewer. Earlier draft said 36% using a stale Opus price of $75/M; corrected to 19% at $25/M.

speed.design: 3 projects x 8 independent functions; projects run sequentially, functions within a project serial (1 agent) vs parallel (8 agents).
speed.note: On tiny units of work, per-agent spawn overhead dominates. Parallelism only wins when each ticket is large enough to amortize the fan-out overhead. Wall-clock is load-sensitive; indicative.
